mapper.select: select id, task_id, event_status, dispatch_retry_count, created_time, updated_time from question_outbox_event where task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} order by created_time desc, id desc limit 1
select id, task_id, event_status, dispatch_retry_count, created_time, updated_time from question_outbox_event where event_status = #{eventStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by created_time asc, id asc
